title: Total Endurance
description: 10-minute EMOM followed by a 10-minute AMRAP to test endurance

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Side shuffles
exercises.instructions: Quick lateral shuffles, 3-4 steps each side

exercises.name: Inchworms
exercises.instructions: Standing, walk hands forward into a plank, then walk back

exercises.name: Deep squat hold
exercises.instructions: Hold a deep squat, back straight, elbows against the knees

exercises.name: Hindu push-ups
exercises.instructions: Diving motion: dive down then arc back up

exercises.name: 1.5 squats
exercises.instructions: Lower, come up halfway, lower again, come up fully

exercises.name: V-ups
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, lift arms and legs to touch the feet

exercises.name: Walking lunges
exercises.instructions: Walk forward in continuous lunges, big steps

exercises.name: Wide push-ups
exercises.instructions: Hands wider than the shoulders, chest focus

exercises.name: Sit-ups
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, sit all the way up, reach for the feet

exercises.name: Glute bridge
exercises.instructions: Like a hip thrust but back on the floor, drive hips up

exercises.name: Psoas stretch
exercises.instructions: Low lunge, drive the hip forward

exercises.name: Hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: Leg extended forward, lean torso forward

exercises.name: World's greatest stretch
exercises.instructions: Lunge + torso rotation + arm to the sky

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale 4s through the nose, hold 4s, exhale 6s through the mouth
